subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Merciful unto them that dwell in the realm of contingent being, calling all unto God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. This is the Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و یدع الکل الی الله المهیمن القیوم هذا یوم
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
